refs.purpose: Cache-population precondition: `summarize` reads an already-cached pin and fails if missing, so `add` fetches the pin into the cache first.
refs.trigger: When the requested pin is not yet present in the configured cache directory.
refs.verification: Cast the skill, `add` a fresh pin then `summarize` it, confirm the cache miss is resolved before the manifest is emitted.

refs.purpose: Emit the deterministic [[galaxy-tool-summary]] manifest for the cached pin; this Mold runs the command rather than hand-authoring the manifest.
refs.trigger: Once the pin is confirmed present in the cache.
refs.verification: Cast the skill, run `summarize` on a cached pin (e.g. staramr_search), confirm the emitted manifest validates against [[galaxy-tool-summary]].

refs.purpose: Runtime that emits the tool summary; the Mold's entire job is invoking it against a populated cache. Install before driving the skill.
Resolve Galaxy tool identity, Tool Shed versioning, and changeset context before summarizing a wrapper.
refs.trigger: When a tool summary starts from a Tool Shed hit rather than an installed Galaxy tool object.

refs.purpose: Treat cached ParsedTool JSON from galaxy-tool-cache as the v1 input source for Galaxy tool summaries.
refs.verification: Summarize FastQC, bwa_mem2, and samtools_sort from cached ParsedTool JSON and confirm downstream step implementation can bind inputs and outputs.

refs.purpose: Validate the manifest emitted by `galaxy-tool-cache summarize` before handing it to downstream step Molds.
Resolve field-level questions about the upstream `ParsedTool` payload embedded under `parsed_tool`.
refs.trigger: When a downstream Mold needs a specific input/output/help/citation field from the embedded `ParsedTool`.

produces.description: Deterministic Galaxy tool summary manifest emitted by `galaxy-tool-cache summarize`: cache provenance, embedded ParsedTool, generated input JSON Schemas.

consumes.description: Pin from [[discover-shed-tool]]; identifies which cached ParsedTool to summarize. Authored UDTs from [[author-galaxy-tool-wrapper]] bypass this Mold.
